_meta.description: In-domain-but-absent queries: the asked-about fact is not in the corpus (a feature a project doesn't have, a skill Tushar doesn't list). correct_chunks is empty; success = the production no-match guardrail fires (zero chunks above the cosine floor). Lifted verbatim from the pre-M3 evals/retrieval/queries.json out-of-corpus set (M3 Phase 1a); query IDs preserved. Distinct from off-topic.json (Phase 1b), which tests behavioral refusal on out-of-scope queries.

scoring.out-of-corpus: correct_chunks is empty; success = zero chunks above the eval's cosine floor (see DEFAULT_COSINE_FLOOR in scripts/eval/dispatch.ts; 0.28 as of M3 Phase 5). These queries are in-domain-but-absent and routinely come back at cosine 0.37-0.47 — they're below-floor by intent but the soft-OOC nature means firing-rate signal sits with the hard-OOC set in out-of-corpus.json.

queries.query: How does the job-search agent handle audio?
